For any non-integer maximum ammo capacity values the capacity is rounded down to the nearest whole number. For example, a Kulstar modded with a max rank Trick Mag will have a calculated maximum ammo capacity of 15 × (1 + 90%) = 28.5 , which will round down to 28 .
